tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
 delete 2
 delete 3
 edit 2
  set name "Deny_Ubuntu_HTTPS"
  set srcintf "port2"
  set dstintf "port1"
  set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
  set dstaddr "all"
  set action deny
  set schedule "always"
  set service "HTTPS"
 next
 edit 3
  set name "Allow_Ubuntu_HTTP"
  set srcintf "port2"
  set dstintf "port1"
  set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
  set dstaddr "all"
  set action accept
  set schedule "always"
  set service "HTTP"
  set nat enable
 next
end
show firewall policy"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
config firewall policy

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #  delete 2

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #  delete 3

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #  edit 2
new entry '2' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #   set name "Deny_Ubuntu_HTTPS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #   set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #   set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #   set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #   set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #   set action deny

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #   set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #   set service "HTTPS"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (2) #  next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) #  edit 3
new entry '3' added

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #   set name "Allow_Ubuntu_HTTP"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #   set srcintf "port2"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #   set dstintf "port1"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #   set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #   set dstaddr "all"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #   set action accept

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #   set schedule "always"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #   set service "HTTP"

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #   set nat enable

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (3) #  next

FortiGate-VM64-KVM (policy) # end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
    edit 2
        set name "Deny_Ubuntu_HTTPS"
        set uuid 07ae6a7e-2abc-51f1-d7a0-92369ea04f05
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTPS"
        set logtraffic disable
    next
edit 3
        set name "Allow_Ubuntu_HTTP"
        set uuid 07b9239c-2abc-51f1-91af-9b6bea1bc118
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "UbuntuComputer"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #
